title: Blooming
body:
![Banner_short](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7bdf8eb25b57bc290681cfe5792c2ba812c1d0c_0.webp)

> (Note: This pack is currently being recoded, with new biome updates and reworks. Stay tuned!)

Blooming is a datapack that expands Minecraft’s world generation in a subtle, vanilla-friendly way.

The generation in the pack is inspired by real-life biomes! But presented in a Minecrafty style.
In addition to new terrain, Blooming also adds several items! One of them being acorns!


## Frequently Asked Questions

- How do I download the Resourcepack?  
**On this page go on versions, click on a release and download the required Resourcepack!**

- How do I install it?  
**The pack has two files the Datapack and the Resourcepack:**  
Place the Data on the Datapacks folder inside your world. And the Resources on Resourcepacks.  

- Is it compatible with a certain pack?  
**Maybe!** As long as that pack doesn't change the same things Blooming changes. It should work!

### Modrinth Launcher:

- Why isn't the textures working on Modrinth?  
**Modrinth doesn't install Resourcepacks.** Copy the file and put on the Resourcepacks folder.

- No world-generation?  
**Modrinth doesn't apply Datapacks to all worlds.** You can add it on world-creation.
